design_context.brief_description: StatCard CLI: a single Go binary that takes a Spanish-language prompt, fetches football stats from API-Football, and renders a publication-ready PNG stat card in under 90 seconds.
design_context.goal: Zero-dependency CLI that lets solo LATAM football content creators replace 60 minutes of manual Canva work with a single command.

components.name: cmd/statcard
components.responsibility: CLI entrypoint. Cobra root + subcommands (init, generate, status).

components.name: internal/parser
components.responsibility: Extracts ParsedQuery from Spanish prompt via regexp.

components.name: internal/apifootball
components.responsibility: HTTP adapter for api-football.com v3 with filesystem cache.

components.name: internal/renderer
components.responsibility: SVG template interpolation + PNG rasterization via oksvg/rasterx.

packages.name: main
packages.purpose: CLI entrypoint, cobra commands, flag wiring

packages.name: parser
packages.purpose: Spanish prompt parsing to ParsedQuery struct

packages.name: templates
packages.purpose: Embedded SVG card templates and font files

key_types.name: ParsedQuery
Config
DailyCounter
H2HStats
key_types.definition:
type H2HStats struct {
  PlayerA  PlayerResult
  PlayerB  PlayerResult
  Matches  int
  WinsA    int
  WinsB    int
  Draws    int
  GoalsA   int
  GoalsB   int
}

key_types.name: CardData
key_types.definition:
type CardData struct {
  Title       string
  Subtitle    string
  EntityA     EntityInfo
  EntityB     EntityInfo
  Stats       []StatRow
  Watermark   string
  GeneratedAt string
}

entry_points.name: statcard generate
entry_points.description: Generate PNG stat cards from Spanish prompt

entry_points.name: statcard status
entry_points.description: Show daily usage and plan info

conventions.test_style: table-driven tests using []struct{ name, input, want }
conventions.no_global_state: true — all state passed via struct or function args

resolved_questions.question: Should init guide API-Football signup?
resolved_questions.decision: Print one-line URL to the API-Football RapidAPI page and prompt user to paste key. No browser automation.

milestones.name: Project Scaffold + Module Init
milestones.goal: Establish Go module, directory layout, embed wiring, cobra root so go build ./... and go test ./... pass.
tasks: Run `go mod init github.com/statcard/statcard` to create go.mod
Add cobra: `go get github.com/spf13/cobra@latest`
Create directories: cmd/statcard/, internal/parser/, internal/apifootball/, internal/renderer/, internal/meter/, internal/config/, internal/metrics/, templates/fonts/
Create cmd/statcard/main.go — cobra root command with version flag and placeholder subcommands (init, generate, status)
Create templates/embed.go — package templates, //go:embed *.svg fonts/*, var FS embed.FS
Add placeholder templates/card.svg with minimal valid SVG
Download Inter-Regular.ttf and Inter-Bold.ttf to templates/fonts/
Add golang.org/x/image: `go get golang.org/x/image@latest`
Add oksvg+rasterx: `go get github.com/srwiley/oksvg@latest github.com/srwiley/rasterx@latest`
Create cmd/statcard/main_test.go — smoke test --version exits 0
definition_of_done: templates.FS.ReadFile('card.svg') returns non-empty bytes in test
test_hints: cmd/statcard/main_test.go: TestVersion — --version flag exits 0 and prints semver
templates/embed_test.go: TestEmbed_CardSVG — FS.ReadFile('card.svg') returns non-nil
templates/embed_test.go: TestEmbed_Font — FS.ReadFile('fonts/Inter-Regular.ttf') returns non-nil

milestones.name: Config + Init Subcommand
milestones.goal: statcard init --api-key <key> persists config.json and statcard status reads it back.
tasks: Create internal/config/config.go — Config struct with APIKey, Watermark, Plan, DailyLimit
Implement config.Load() (*Config, error) — reads ~/.statcard/config.json; ErrNotConfigured if missing
Implement config.Save(c *Config) error — marshals to ~/.statcard/config.json, os.MkdirAll 0700
Implement config.DefaultPath() string — filepath.Join(os.UserHomeDir(), '.statcard', 'config.json')
Wire statcard init cobra subcommand — --api-key required, --watermark optional, call config.Save
Wire statcard status cobra subcommand — call config.Load, print plan and limit
Create internal/config/config_test.go — Load missing file, Save+Load round-trip, DailyLimit defaults to 5
test_hints: internal/config/config_test.go: TestLoad_Missing — returns ErrNotConfigured
internal/config/config_test.go: TestSaveLoad_RoundTrip — Save then Load returns identical Config
internal/config/config_test.go: TestDailyLimit_Default — DailyLimit=5 when zero-value
milestones.integration_notes: Import internal/config in cmd/statcard/main.go. config.Load() called at root PersistentPreRunE.

milestones.name: Daily Usage Meter
milestones.goal: meter.Check enforces 5-card/day limit, resetting at midnight, testable in isolation.
tasks: Create internal/meter/meter.go — DailyCounter struct {Date string, Count int}
Implement meter.Load() (*DailyCounter, error) — reads ~/.statcard/counter.json; fresh counter if missing
Implement meter.Save(dc *DailyCounter) error — writes ~/.statcard/counter.json
Implement meter.Check(dc *DailyCounter, limit int) error — ErrDailyLimitReached if count>=limit; reset if date changed
Implement meter.Increment(dc *DailyCounter) — bumps Count by 1
Create internal/meter/meter_test.go — 4 test cases: allow <limit, block ==limit, reset on date change, Increment round-trip
definition_of_done: Check with yesterday's date and count=5 resets to 0 and returns nil
test_hints: internal/meter/meter_test.go: TestCheck_Allow — count=4 limit=5 → nil
internal/meter/meter_test.go: TestCheck_Block — count=5 limit=5 → ErrDailyLimitReached
internal/meter/meter_test.go: TestCheck_DateReset — yesterday date count=99 → resets to 0, nil
internal/meter/meter_test.go: TestIncrement_RoundTrip — Increment Save Load → count=1
milestones.integration_notes: Import internal/meter in cmd/statcard. meter.Load+meter.Check called before parser.Parse in generate RunE.

milestones.name: Spanish Prompt Parser
milestones.goal: parser.Parse converts Spanish free-form prompt to typed ParsedQuery; testable against real creator inputs.
tasks: Create internal/parser/parser.go — ParsedQuery struct {EntityA, EntityB, Context, QueryType string}
Define constants: QueryTypeH2HPlayers, QueryTypeH2HTeams, QueryTypeUnknown
Implement parser.Parse(prompt string) (ParsedQuery, error) — regexp finds vs/VS/contra/Contra separator
Extract EntityA before separator, EntityB between separator and 'en', Context after 'en'
Return error in Spanish if no separator: 'no se encontró comparación — usá vs o contra entre los dos nombres'
Strip punctuation and extra whitespace from EntityA and EntityB
Create internal/parser/parser_test.go — 6 test cases including accented chars and separator variants
definition_of_done: Parse('Messi vs Cristiano') → EntityA='Messi', EntityB='Cristiano', Context=''
Parse('messi contra mbappé en Champions League') → EntityA='messi', EntityB='mbappé', Context='Champions League'
Parse('solo messi') → non-nil error with Spanish message
test_hints: internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_VSseparator — 'Messi vs Cristiano' → correct fields
internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_ContraSeparator — 'messi contra mbappé en Champions League' → correct fields
internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_NoSeparator — 'solo messi' → error
internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_Empty — '' → error
internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_ExtraSpaces — 'Messi  vs  Cristiano' → trimmed names
internal/parser/parser_test.go: TestParse_AccentedChars — 'mbappé' and 'López' preserved correctly
milestones.integration_notes: Import internal/parser in cmd/statcard. parser.Parse called after meter.Check in generate RunE.

milestones.name: API-Football HTTP Adapter
milestones.goal: apifootball package fetches real player and H2H data with filesystem cache; tests run without live API calls.
tasks: Create internal/apifootball/types.go — PlayerResult, TeamResult, H2HStats structs
Create internal/apifootball/client.go — Client struct {APIKey, HTTPClient, CacheDir}
Implement apifootball.NewClient(apiKey, cacheDir string) *Client — 10s timeout
Implement client.SearchPlayer(name string) ([]PlayerResult, error) — GET /players?search={name}, cache 24h
Implement client.SearchTeam(name string) ([]TeamResult, error) — GET /teams?search={name}, cache 24h
Implement client.GetH2H(idA, idB int) (H2HStats, error) — GET /fixtures/h2h?h2h={a}-{b}, cache 1h
Implement writeCache/readCache helpers with TTL check via file mtime
Create internal/apifootball/testdata/player-search-messi.json and h2h-fixture.json
Create internal/apifootball/client_test.go — fixture-based tests, cache hit test, empty results test
definition_of_done: go test ./internal/apifootball/... passes with no live HTTP calls
SearchPlayer with fixture returns PlayerResult with non-empty Name
Cache hit test: http.Client.Do called exactly once across two identical SearchPlayer calls
Empty results returns empty slice and nil error
test_hints: internal/apifootball/client_test.go: TestSearchPlayer_Fixture — returns PlayerResult with Name='Lionel Messi'
internal/apifootball/client_test.go: TestSearchPlayer_CacheHit — Do called exactly once
internal/apifootball/client_test.go: TestSearchPlayer_EmptyResults — empty slice, nil error
internal/apifootball/client_test.go: TestGetH2H_Fixture — Matches>0
internal/apifootball/client_test.go: TestCacheTTL_Expired — mtime 25h ago → cache miss
milestones.integration_notes: Import internal/apifootball in cmd/statcard. apifootball.NewClient called with config.APIKey and ~/.statcard/cache/. SearchPlayer called for EntityA and EntityB from ParsedQuery.

milestones.name: SVG Template + PNG Renderer
milestones.goal: renderer.RenderCard writes valid 1080x1080 and 1080x1350 PNG files from CardData using embedded SVG template.
tasks: Replace placeholder templates/card.svg with real SVG using rect/text/line/circle, viewBox 1080x1080, Go template vars: {{.Title}}, {{.Subtitle}}, {{.EntityA.Name}}, {{.EntityB.Name}}, {{.EntityA.AccentColor}}, {{.EntityB.AccentColor}}, {{range .Stats}}, {{.Watermark}}
Create templates/card-portrait.svg — viewBox 1080x1350 variant
Create internal/renderer/renderer.go — Renderer struct {FS embed.FS}, EntityInfo struct, StatRow struct
Implement renderer.New(fs embed.FS) *Renderer
Implement renderer.interpolateSVG(templateName string, data CardData) (string, error) — text/template.ParseFS + Execute
Implement renderer.rasterize(svgContent string, width, height int) (image.Image, error) — oksvg.ReadIconStream + rasterx.NewDasher
Implement renderer.savePNG(img image.Image, path string) error — image/png.Encode
Implement renderer.RenderCard(data CardData, outputDir string, formats []string, watermark string) ([]string, error) — timestamp filename, iterate formats
Load Inter-Regular.ttf and Inter-Bold.ttf in renderer.New from embed.FS
Create internal/renderer/renderer_test.go — 3 test cases: valid PNGs written, filename format, unknown format error
definition_of_done: Both PNGs decode via image/png.Decode with no error
test_hints: internal/renderer/renderer_test.go: TestRenderCard_TwoFormats — square+portrait both decode as valid PNG
internal/renderer/renderer_test.go: TestRenderCard_Filename — filename contains entity names and timestamp
internal/renderer/renderer_test.go: TestRenderCard_UnknownFormat — returns error, no files written
milestones.integration_notes: Import internal/renderer and templates in cmd/statcard. renderer.New(templates.FS) called once at startup. RenderCard called after GetH2H with built CardData.

milestones.name: Generate Subcommand — Full Happy Path
milestones.goal: statcard 'Messi vs Cristiano' with valid API key produces two PNG files, wiring all components.
tasks: Extract apifootball.ClientInterface interface {SearchPlayer, SearchTeam, GetH2H} for testability
Wire generate as cobra root command RunE — positional arg is prompt

Implement generate RunE: 1) config.Load 2) meter.Check 3) parser.Parse 4) client.SearchPlayer(A+B) 5) client.GetH2H 6) build CardData from H2HStats 7) renderer.RenderCard 8) meter.Increment+Save 9) metrics.Append 10) print file paths
Create internal/metrics/metrics.go — MetricsEntry struct, Append(entry MetricsEntry) error with O_APPEND|O_CREATE
Create cmd/statcard/generate_test.go — mock ClientInterface, assert 2 PNG paths in stdout, test error paths
Add --verbose flag: debug logging to stderr of HTTP URLs and durations
definition_of_done: ./statcard 'Messi vs Cristiano' with valid API key writes 2 PNGs and prints paths
./statcard 'solo messi' exits non-zero with Spanish error
./statcard without init exits non-zero with setup instructions
6th card attempt exits non-zero with limit message
~/.statcard/metrics.jsonl has one new JSON line per successful generation
test_hints: cmd/statcard/generate_test.go: TestGenerate_Happy — mock client, assert stdout has 2 .png paths
cmd/statcard/generate_test.go: TestGenerate_NoConfig — ErrNotConfigured → exit 1 + setup message
cmd/statcard/generate_test.go: TestGenerate_LimitReached — ErrDailyLimitReached → exit 1 + Spanish limit msg
cmd/statcard/generate_test.go: TestGenerate_ParseError — 'solo jugador' → exit 1 + Spanish parse error
cmd/statcard/generate_test.go: TestGenerate_NoResults — SearchPlayer returns empty → exit 1 + Spanish no-results
milestones.integration_notes: Imports: internal/config, internal/meter, internal/parser, internal/apifootball, internal/renderer, internal/metrics, templates. renderer.New(templates.FS) at startup.

milestones.name: Status Subcommand + Full Output
milestones.goal: statcard status shows cards today, limit, plan, and weekly total.
tasks: Expand statcard status RunE: config.Load, meter.Load, compute remaining, read last 7 lines of metrics.jsonl, print formatted status block
Print: plan tier, daily usage (N/M cards), cards remaining today, total cards this week
Create cmd/statcard/status_test.go — assert output contains 'cards', usage fraction, plan tier
Update statcard init to print status after successful config creation
definition_of_done: ./statcard status after init prints plan='free', daily usage, cards remaining
test_hints: cmd/statcard/status_test.go: TestStatus_Happy — config+counter with Count=2 → output contains '2/5'
cmd/statcard/status_test.go: TestStatus_NoConfig — exits non-zero with setup instructions
cmd/statcard/status_test.go: TestStatus_ZeroUsage — Count=0 → '0/5' in output
milestones.integration_notes: Imports: internal/config, internal/meter, internal/metrics. No API calls.

milestones.name: Error Handling, Logging, Release Binary
milestones.goal: All error paths use Spanish messages, Makefile builds static binary, go test ./... and go vet ./... pass.
tasks: Audit all RunE: replace generic errors with Spanish user-facing messages in stderr
Add --verbose flag to root: debug HTTP URLs and durations to stderr
Create Makefile with: build (CGO_ENABLED=0, GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64), build-linux (GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64), test (go test ./...), lint (go vet ./...)
Add -ldflags '-X main.version=...' reading from git tag or defaulting to 'dev'
Run go vet ./... and fix all warnings
Run go test ./... and confirm all non-integration tests pass
Write README.md: installation, quickstart (init + generate), flag reference, API-Football setup link
definition_of_done: go test ./... passes with zero failures
All user-facing error messages in Spanish
./bin/statcard --help shows init, status, and generate with descriptions
test_hints: go vet ./... produces no output
./bin/statcard --help contains 'init', 'status', usage example
./bin/statcard --verbose 'Messi vs Cristiano' prints HTTP URL lines to stderr
milestones.integration_notes: All packages integrated. Final validation of full pipeline.

risk_register.risk: oksvg does not support SVG features needed for card design
risk_register.mitigation: Card template uses only rect, text, line, circle with solid fills. Validate in m6-renderer.

risk_register.risk: API-Football free tier (100 req/day) exhausted during development
risk_register.mitigation: All tests use testdata fixtures. Integration tests gated behind //go:build integration.

risk_register.risk: Font rendering inside rasterx may not align with oksvg SVG text elements
risk_register.mitigation: Use oksvg for SVG text; if insufficient, replace with opentype glyph outlines.

risk_register.risk: Concurrent writes to ~/.statcard/ could corrupt files
risk_register.mitigation: Atomic write via os.Rename. Document concurrent use unsupported.
